description: MCP Server configuration reference for Gurun Expo project

tavily-search.purpose: Web search for documentation, best practices, and dependency research

github.purpose: GitHub API access for issues, PRs, and repository management

sequential-thinking.purpose: Structured reasoning and multi-step problem solving

expo-mcp.purpose: Expo SDK documentation, dependency management, EAS builds, simulator automation
expo-mcp.requirement: EAS paid plan required for server capabilities. Local capabilities free with SDK 54+
expo-mcp.notes: Recommended for: Expo doc search, npx expo install guidance, EAS build management, screenshot/automation testing

context7.purpose: Docs-aware MCP that fetches relevant library documentation on demand
context7.notes: Not installed — tavily-search covers web research. Add if library doc access becomes a bottleneck

filesystem.purpose: Provides file read/write access to the agent
filesystem.notes: OpenCode already has native file system access — would duplicate functionality
